content.json:
# IntuneUp – Device Telemetry Dashboard

Reporting basato su dati raccolti dai device tramite la pipeline IntuneUp (PowerShell → Azure Function → Service Bus → Log Analytics).

content.query:
IntuneUp_LoginInformation_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceName
| count
content.title: Active Devices (reporting in range)

content.query:
IntuneUp_LoginInformation_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend dev = parse_json(Data)
| extend UptimeHours = toreal(dev.UptimeHours)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceName
| where UptimeHours > 336
| count
content.title: Devices pending reboot (>14 days)

content.query:
IntuneUp_LoginInformation_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend dev = parse_json(Data)
| extend UptimeHours = toreal(dev.UptimeHours)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceName
| where UptimeHours > 336
| project DeviceName, UPN,
          UptimeDays = round(UptimeHours / 24, 1),
          LastBootTime = tostring(parse_json(Data).LastBootTime)
| sort by UptimeDays desc
content.title: Devices pending reboot – detail

content.query:
IntuneUp_LoginInformation_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend dev = parse_json(Data)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceName
| extend JoinType = case(
    tobool(parse_json(Data).AzureAdJoined) == true and tobool(parse_json(Data).DomainJoined) == true, "Hybrid",
    tobool(parse_json(Data).AzureAdJoined) == true, "Azure AD Only",
    tobool(parse_json(Data).DomainJoined)  == true, "Domain Only",
    "Workgroup")
| summarize Count = count() by JoinType
content.title: Device join type distribution

content.query:
IntuneUp_LoginInformation_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend dev = parse_json(Data)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceName
| project DeviceName, UPN,
          LastLoggedOnUser = tostring(parse_json(Data).LastLoggedOnUser),
          LastLoggedOnDisplayName = tostring(parse_json(Data).LastLoggedOnDisplayName),
          AzureAdJoined = tobool(parse_json(Data).AzureAdJoined),
          DomainJoined = tobool(parse_json(Data).DomainJoined),
          UptimeHours = toreal(parse_json(Data).UptimeHours),
          TimeGenerated
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: All devices – latest snapshot
